reviews.review_title: I'm a moderator get this game best game
reviews.review_description: I love this game I'm a mod and great moderators and moderation let's give credits. OWNER. skydr.  Moderator me and shadow skydr ..   co. owner shadow

I met the dev in game and he's a really cool guy he accidently posted the game early and like no seeds worked but he fixed them its a pretty fun game that doesn't deserve the bad revews.      PS I like the game meep garden but raiding this game for promotion is honestly so  mest up it gives me a hole different perspective on the game entirely
Pretty fire game, but I'm removing 2 stars due to the use of ai which I hate with all my soul
i love this game i think it's great i think you totally play it.  can i have moderator please since i'm currently the only person playing it
i actually like this its not like other gag games in vr like bwah
Hands i installed this game i loaded in with admins and there where super nice and i love all of the seeds best game
can't even use the seeds can't even sell anything this game  sucks meet garden 900% way better

developer_response.body: Again this game is in alpha so I’m still fixing a lot of stuff and promoting your own game is against meta policy so your review and account will be reported.

reviews.review_title: This game SUCKS (and it uses ai)
reviews.review_description: this game sucks, its low effort, if you want a better one, try Meep Garden its 100X better

developer_response.body: I don’t use ai there is a way better update, this update was from 1 month ago and I’ve been working on it way more. And just so you know false claimant's and promoting your game violate meta developer policy which can lead a review removal and a possible suspension in leaving reviews.
